---
title: "bruh"
author: "Joey Frost-Xenopoulos - 0730136"
date: "2025-01-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r, fig.height = 9}
# Setting up the matrices for processing
library(magick)
library(raster)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(dplyr)
set.seed(123)

# Define directories
base_dir <- normalizePath(
  Sys.getenv("MAGNETO_SERVER_DIR", unset = "D:/SERVER/1902"),
  winslash = "/",
  mustWork = FALSE
)
output_dir <- normalizePath(
  Sys.getenv("MAGNETO_TT_IMAGES_DIR", unset = file.path(getwd(), "TTimages")),
  winslash = "/",
  mustWork = FALSE
)

# Ensure the output directory exists
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
    dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

# Get all base names starting with "AGC-" and ending with a specific pattern
files <- list.files(base_dir, pattern = "^AGC-.*\\.tif$", full.names = FALSE)
base_names <- gsub("\\.tif$", "", files)  # Remove ".tif" extension

# Loop through each base name
for (base_name in base_names) {
    # Construct paths using the base name
    tif_path <- paste0(base_dir, base_name, ".tif")
    rds_path <- paste0(base_dir, base_name, ".tif-Digitized.rds")
    tt_rds_path <- file.path(base_dir, "TimingTicks", paste0(base_name, ".rds"))
    
    # Check if required files exist
    if (!file.exists(tif_path) || !file.exists(rds_path) || !file.exists(tt_rds_path)) {
        cat("Skipping", base_name, "- Missing files\n")
        next
    }
    
    # Load data
    img_rds <- readRDS(rds_path)
    obj <- readRDS(tt_rds_path)
    img <- image_read(tif_path)
    
    # Rotate image if needed
    if (image_info(img)$width < image_info(img)$height) {
        img <- image_rotate(img, -90)
    }
    
    # Get image dimensions
    img_height <- image_info(img)$height
    img_width <- image_info(img)$width
    
    # Draw on the image
    img <- image_draw(img)
    
    # Add red lines for top trace (adjust for inverted y-axis)
    lines(seq(from = img_rds$TopTraceStartEnds$Start + 125, 
              to = img_rds$TopTraceStartEnds$End + 125),
          y = img_height - (img_rds$TopTraceMatrix + 96), col = "red")
    
    # Add red lines for bottom trace (adjust for inverted y-axis)
    lines(seq(from = img_rds$BottomTraceStartEnds$Start + 125, 
              to = img_rds$BottomTraceStartEnds$End + 125),
          y = img_height - (img_rds$BottomTraceMatrix + 96), col = "red")
    
    # Add green line for the filtered range (adjust for inverted y-axis)
   # lines(obj$X, img_height - obj$Y, col = "green")
    
    for (i in seq_along(tt[[2]][["median_X"]])) {
  segments(
    x0 = tt[[2]][["median_X"]][i],  # x position for the line
    x1 = tt[[2]][["median_X"]][i],  # same x for vertical line
    y0 = img_height - 300,           # starting y position
    y1 = img_height - 500,           # ending y position
    col = "red",        # line color
    lwd = 1             # line width
  )
}  


  for (i in seq_along(tt[[1]][["median_X"]])) {
  segments(
    x0 = tt[[1]][["median_X"]][i],  # x position for the line
    x1 = tt[[1]][["median_X"]][i],  # same x for vertical line
    y0 = img_height - 100,           # starting y position
    y1 = img_height - 300,           # ending y position
    col = "red",        # line color
    lwd = 1             # line width
  )
}
    # Finalize drawing
    dev.off()
    
    # Save the modified image
    output_path <- paste0(output_dir, base_name, ".png")
    image_write(img, path = output_path, format = "png")
    
    cat("Processed and saved:", output_path, "\n")
}

cat("All images processed and saved in", output_dir, "\n")


```
